review_title: SearchAtlas is the Rock Star of Agentic SEO
description: It's the best professional family I don't have any blood ties to I could ask for. The team and leadership of the company is amazing. [sensitive content hidden] are rockstars in this space. And rightfully so. All while doing so, they treat their clients like people, not account numbers.
author: Terry C.
pros: SearchAtlas is the most advanced piece of software I have ever used in any sort of a professional manner. The platform is powerful, does it's job, and then some. It blows away the competition (SEMrush and Ahrefs). It helps me deliver results for my clients with a small team that is unheard of in recent years. I'm able to get my clients on the map pack and get found in local searches, much less in AI chats
cons: I don't have anything negative to say. If I have to bring up the "bad" the only thing I can say is that due to how fast they innovate and introduce new tools, the platform does get bugs and has glitches, but they are quickly resolved. And on that note, the support team is fantastic, and is growing and innovating as well.

description: I have been using SearchAtlas since June, 2025 and they continue to amaze me with the level of depth they provide in improving SEO results for my website. For the price of their monthly subscription fee, it is easily worth 3x as much. They continue to make every aspect more intuitive and impactful, and the results I have achieved are tangible, which isn't always the case when working on SEO. Most of all, their technical support team is amazing. They are knowledgeable, patient and get the job done. I cannot recommend SearchAtlas enough!
author: Mark K.
pros: Comprehensive, powerful and intuitive SEO platform that addresses every aspect of correcting errors, improving content and increasing ranking across search engines and LLMs.
cons: I have not found anything negative after using Search Atlas for the last nine months. They keep adding features, beyond my expectations.

description: I jumped into Search Atlas with both feet after more than 6 years with SEMrush. Not that SEMrush was bad, but the promise of AI with their tool "OTTO" was quite appealing to me. However, a few days in and I started noticing some problems. 1) The load time of the site is very slow. I saw the "spinning circle of death" a lot more than I should, and it lasts for several minutes. 2) Their programs are buggy. I installed the OTTO code onto a test site and Search Atlas told me it was there. I go in the next day, and it says the code is not set correctly. I reinstall the code and it is back. It stays that way for several days then it tells me that it is not set up correctly, again. This continues to happen for a couple of weeks. 3) I use their GBP "Galactic" tool to generate some citations for a client. A few days later, those citations disappear! Then, when trying to add them again, they get added to the wrong client. 4) Support. I am convinced that there are no real humans here to support their product. They only allow support through their chat program. I asked to speak to someone on the phone and they don't offer phone support. They told me they could schedule a video call with me in 4 days! I would have to wait 4 days to speak to a human about my urgent problem! 5) Just now, I click on the link for "Help", because the chat help bubble isn't loading. The link to "Help" doesn't even work! Looks like I am going to be going back to SEMrush or maybe another competitor. I can't offer the Search Atlas services to my agency clients in good faith. Hopefully they can turn it around, but as of March 31, 2025, it's not even close to working as sold.
author: Mark B.
pros: The dashboard gathers a lot of useful data
cons: It's buggy, slow, and support is lacking
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Search Atlas is coming for every SEO tool out there, and they're doing it fast!
description: As someone early in my entrepreneurship journey, Search Atlas has given me a level of clarity and confidence that I am forever grateful for. I signed up in December and have been using it to build my own website and digital footprint so I can truly practice what I preach with clients as I help them with their online visibility. I first met [sensitive content hidden] at SEO Week and later met more of the team at a client summit in NYC. What stood out most was how genuinely supportive and accessible everyone was. The support is unmatched. The platform is powerful, but the community and support are what make it special. For a small business owner trying to do things the right way from day one, that combination has been incredibly reassuring.
author: Samantha Q.
pros: Community support and value for money are unmatched. I've used quite a few SEO marketing platforms over the past decade, and I truly feel that Search Atlas is top-tier. There are so many learning and support resources that I truly appreciate. Their agility and speed in creating new features and keeping up with industry trends are impressive.
cons: There is a fairly steep learning curve to the platform, BUT that is only because there is so much in it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: As Profound as it is Simple - Brilliant Tech and Team!
description: The best AI LLM SEO Agentics I’ve seen on earth. I’ve seen the results for myself. Now - I share them with my clients. Winner - Winner!
author: KC S.
pros: The power to know what is and needs to be done with almost absolute certainty - in a matter of moments.
cons: The only con - it’s deep. But with the Atlas Brain - all you need is to pay attention take notes and talk.

description: It’s been a great experience. As an agency owner it’s rare for SaaS tools to meet the hype of their marketing - I can honestly say that this platform really is incredible and worth the investment.
author: Evan O.
pros: The performance and impact of this app on my marketing agency has been phenomenal. I would not say it’s easy to use at first, but they gave me 1:1 setup support and have had multiple events showcasing every new feature — with SEO it’s unbeatable. But their new features like content creation, google business page management, make this a highly valuable asset that I’ve never seen anything come close to.
cons: The initial setup was overwhelming and as a technical person that’s rare. But support is fast and effective and moved me through the setup hurdle so I could focus on implementing an saving time.

review_title: Wished I had found Search Atlas sooner. Their the best SEO/AI Visibility Platform in the Market
description: No regrets! I wished I had found them sooner. I never knew SEO and LLM Visibility could be so exciting.
author: Tina G.
pros: Their platform is like a powerful work horse. It's allowed me to scale so much quickly and after using it for a few months, I've been able to gain organic traffic that would've taken me years.
cons: The platform is packed with so many powerful features and the team ships updates and improvements constantly to keep up with user needs and the fast moving AI landscape. With this level of rapid innovation, the occasional bug does pop up, but issues are addressed pretty quickly. Their AI support bot is amazingly capable, but you also have options to speak with real humans as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: FULL STACK & AGENTS = SUPER HUMAN LEVEL IMPACT
description: LOVE the AI SUMMIT and suggest any brand manager take this 5 day course. Most of AI is set-up - and this has great integrations so everything runs and gets done. BUT you have to set it up properly.
author: Carolyn P.
pros: It's full stack digital marketing. It has AI agents baked in to max what you can do, with options to review before anything ever goes live.
cons: They are working on their payment platform edge. I think it was a side issue and they're more focused on dev with AI. But they have good customer service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Misleading, Buggy, and Impossible to Cancel
description: My overall experience with SearchAtlas has been nothing short of frustrating and disappointing. The product doesn't work as advertised, with constant technical issues that prevent any real work from getting done. Support is nonexistent, and the training material is entirely unhelpful. Attempting to cancel has been a nightmare, and I’ve been left feeling misled and trapped. I wouldn’t recommend this to anyone.
author: Marvin B.
pros: Honestly, there’s very little to praise here. The interface looks promising at first, but that quickly fades once you realize nothing functions as expected.
cons: Nearly everything. The platform is loaded with bugs, making it incredibly frustrating to use. The support team is either nonexistent or unresponsive, and the "training materials" are essentially sales pitches with no real guidance. Worst of all, canceling is next to impossible—they make it incredibly difficult to get out, and you feel trapped in a subscription for a product that doesn’t work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This company and its product are absolute garbage. They advertise that they can automate ads. They don't give you suggestions that only marketers would understand. You are better off uploading your data to ChatGPT and asking it for free. I removed all the sites from the platform, got charged a month later (so I didn't use it for a full month), noticed it on my bank, and requested a refund. That's a NO. They are out to churn and burn through clients to get all the cash they can.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's available but requires you to do a lot of work upfront, including SEO, even if all you want to do is manage campaigns.
cons: It doesn't work. Even with the optimization suggestions, you are better off finding a different (easier and more cost-effective) way to accomplish the same goal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Comprehensive view of any site's subdomain or pages
author: Abigail D.
pros: SearchAtlas offers users a comprehensive view of any site's subdomain or pages, making it easier to analyze the entire online presence of a domain. This feature proves valuable in understanding the linking patterns and strategies employed across various sections of a website. By comparing subdomains or specific pages, users can gain a better understanding of the effectiveness of different areas of their own or their competitors' websites in attracting backlinks.
cons: The only aspect I found unfavorable about SearchAtlas is the setup process. I don't recall having any kind of guided onboarding experience (or perhaps I inadvertently skipped it). Instead, I had to rely on external tutorials and help documentation to learn how to use the tool.

author: Benjamin R.
pros: One of the standout features of SearchAtlas is its robust keyword research tool. With this tool, I can uncover high-performing keywords that drive significant traffic to our website. By tracking keyword performance and making data-backed optimizations, we have witnessed a substantial increase in organic traffic and visibility
cons: It impressively covers a wide array of features and functionalities that effectively fulfill my SEO requirements. Nevertheless, I would value their dedication to user support and the advancement of educational resources, which would enhance user proficiency. Expanding the content within their academy would serve as a valuable contribution to fostering a comprehensive learning experience.

author: Olivia A.
pros: We have been using Site Audit tool within SearchAtlas. The inclusion of ""How to Fix"" guides for every issue on your website is a standout feature of SearchAtlas. These guides provide step-by-step instructions on resolving each problem, making it easy for users to take action and improve their site's performance.
cons: By making more use of functionalities like monitoring rankings and analyzing competitors, companies can stay well-informed about prevailing trends in their industry. This enables them to maintain a competitive edge by effectively employing successful digital marketing strategies, thereby generating leads through online platforms

author: Isabella W.
pros: The Backlink Analyzer tool in LinkGraph's SearchAtlas Software Suite is a game-changer for monitoring and evaluating backlinks. With its accurate and comprehensive data, I can analyze not only my own backlink profile but also those of my competitors. This allows me to benchmark my performance, uncover link building opportunities, and strategize more effectively to improve my website's visibility and authority in search engine results.
cons: The level of customization for reports and downloads in SearchAtlas is limited, which requires additional effort to tailor them according to specific preferences.

author: Evelyn R.
pros: It satisfied our agency with the Backlink Analyzer tool, providing in-depth analysis of domain authority, domain rating, and backlink data. This allows us to identify toxic or spammy backlinks, evaluate the health of our clients' backlink profiles, and develop customized link building strategies that align with their goals. With the accuracy and granularity of this tool, we consistently drive organic growth and improve search engine rankings for our clients.
cons: There is an abundance of features, and I constantly have the feeling of potentially overlooking something valuable.

review_title: A Must-Have Tool for SEO and Content Optimization
author: James C.
pros: Overall, SearchAtlas has proven to be an indispensable companion in our marketing journey. Its wealth of features, accurate data, and seamless project management capabilities have made it an essential tool for achieving our goals and delivering exceptional results for our clients. We wholeheartedly recommend SearchAtlas to any marketer seeking to elevate their SEO and content marketing endeavors.
cons: When it comes to SearchAtlas, I must express my satisfaction as I couldn't identify any significant drawbacks or aspects that I disliked. This platform impressively encompasses a wide range of features and tools that effectively address diverse aspects of SEO and website optimization.

description: Content Planner tool within SearchAtlas proved to be a game-changer for my content writing endeavors. Its ability to create content calendars efficiently, provide relevant keyword and topic ideas, and simplify the content strategy process truly set it apart. Thanks to SearchAtlas, I was able to elevate my content creation and ensure that my content aligned with the needs and interests of my target audience.
author: Daniele C.
pros: I have been using Content Planner tool. This tool proved to be an invaluable asset in streamlining my content creation process and enhancing the effectiveness of my content strategy. One of the standout features of the Content Planner was its ability to create content marketing and editorial calendars in a fraction of the time. By incorporating relevant keywords and topics into my writing, I was able to enhance the visibility of my content and attract a targeted audience.
cons: While there may be a slight learning curve with SearchAtlas, the availability of one-to-one demos proves to be an invaluable resource. The platform also boasts a remarkable collection of instructional videos on YouTube, offering a wealth of knowledge.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Henry R.
pros: With its user-friendly interface and a plethora of helpful features, even novice users can quickly grasp the platform's functionalities without the need for extensive training. Its intuitive design empowers users to effortlessly navigate through the tools and harness the platform's capabilities for effective SEO planning and execution.
cons: A common concern raised by users is the frequency of email alerts from SearchAtlas, with some experiencing difficulties in disabling them.

author: Scarlett R.
pros: SearchAtlas stands as a highly potent tool, offering an array of robust features such as keyword research, audits, backlink analysis, competitor analysis, and ranking tracking. Its comprehensive nature enables users to develop and execute effective digital strategies, ensuring optimal results for their online endeavors.
cons: Some users find the connection between SearchAtlas and Google Search Console (GSC) or Google Analytics (GA) a bit confusing.

author: Gabriel B.
pros: With SearchAtlas, you can conduct a thorough backlink analysis to identify any potentially harmful links pointing to your website. The platform utilizes advanced algorithms to evaluate the quality and relevance of each backlink, helping you determine which links may be detrimental to your site's SEO.
cons: Great for advance SEO teams, hard to manage so many tools for beginners

author: Samuel C.
pros: LinkGraph's SearchAtlas Software Suite offers an exceptional Backlink Analyzer tool that provides access to approximately 30 trillion high-quality backlinks. This vast database ensures accurate and comprehensive backlink data, allowing me to evaluate my website's performance and stay informed about my competitors' campaigns. With this tool, I can confidently make data-driven decisions to enhance my link building strategies and improve my organic search rankings.
cons: Additionally, I would appreciate an expansion of the local research options available in SearchAtlas.

review_title: Your One-Stop Shop for SEO Success
author: Seraphina F.
pros: From tracking keyword rankings to performing detailed backlink analyses and staying ahead of the competition, SearchAtlas equips me with the tools I need to deliver outstanding results for my clients. Don't settle for anything less than SearchAtlas when it comes to optimizing search engine performance.
cons: However, the suite's limited mobile accessibility poses a minor inconvenience for mobile-centric users like me.

author: Willow S.
pros: Whether it's improving keyword targeting, optimizing paid search performance, or identifying areas for improvement, SearchAtlas provides the tools I need to excel in both areas of digital marketing.
cons: While SearchAtlas offers a wealth of SEO features, its limited mobile accessibility hinders the flexibility and convenience of users like me.

author: Matthew P.
pros: SearchAtlas offers unparalleled data and insights when it comes to SEO and keyword targeting, providing users with comprehensive information for effective optimization strategies.
cons: There are no downsides to using Semrush. It provides almost all features related to SEO.

author: Asher F.
pros: I rely on tools like SearchAtlas to optimize my clients' search engine performance. With SearchAtlas, I have a centralized platform where I can effortlessly access and analyze crucial SEO data, including keyword rankings, backlinks, and competition analysis. This invaluable tool allows me to quickly address SEO issues, improve keyword targeting, and strengthen backlink profiles, giving my clients a competitive edge in the digital landscape.
cons: I value the versatility of tools like SearchAtlas. However, the suite's current lack of mobile accessibility limits my ability to work on SEO tasks outside of my desktop setup.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
